name: Multi-Agent Spawner
description: Spawn one or more parallel sub-agents to handle independent sub-tasks simultaneously. Each sub-agent runs a separate prompt and returns its result. Use this to parallelize work: research multiple topics at once, run several analyses in parallel, or divide a large task into concurrent workstreams. Returns a combined result from all sub-agents.

tasks.description: List of sub-task objects to run in parallel. Each has 'label' and 'prompt'.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for all sub-agents to complete. Default: 120
